---
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme:
      - style.scss
    include-before-body: 
      text: |
        <style>
          #quarto-dashboard-header {
            display: none
          }
        </style>
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev = "svglite",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4.5
)
```


```{r}
source(here::here("scripts/main.R"))
```


{{< include scripts/_languages.qmd >}}
